title: Snapping into Love (Uncensored)
description: Do-jun becomes a college student and begins his dream life. However, Do-jun was suffering from an unwanted cohabitation with Ra-on, a female friend who had been harassing him since his school days. Annoyed with the situation, he hypnotizes her. “I’ve suffered every time thanks to you. Let’s see how you would like it!”
author: Tama
